etymology.description: 表(表) (biǎo, "surface; external") + 示(示) (shì, "show; indicate") captures the idea of making something visible or apparent. 表(表) suggests the external manifestation and 示(示) adds the action of showing or making known.
etymology.interpretation: 表(表) (biǎo, "surface; external") relates to something outward or visible — one expresses thought by making it visible, which leads to 'show; express.' 示(示) (shì, "show; indicate") involves presenting or pointing out, which is a clear semantic link to 'indicate.' Together, 表示 means to bring something to the external or visible plane — to 'show, express, or indicate.'

examples.chinese: 她点头表示同意(她點頭表示同意)。
他的礼物表示感谢(他的禮物表示感謝)。
请用行动来表示支持(請用行動來表示支持)。
examples.pinyin: Qǐng yòng xíngdòng lái biǎoshì zhīchí.
examples.english: Please use actions to express support.
